# findCriticalPath

> Identify the critical path in a trace (longest sequential chain)

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| spans | json | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[graph: call]
  A --> B[longestPath: call]
  B --> C[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `json`
